## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting.

## Motivation

Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve? Is there a workaround you're currently using?

## Proposed API

```tsx
// Show the proposed component/hook usage
import { MyNewComponent } from '@forge-ui/primitives';

<MyNewComponent>
  {/* ... */}
</MyNewComponent>
```

## Accessibility considerations

Are there relevant ARIA patterns that should be followed?
- [ ] I've checked the [ARIA Authoring Practices Guide](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/)
- [ ] Link to relevant pattern:

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or prior art here.
